summary: The suite covers all five core requirements (parsing, filtering, ranking, reporting, mockable pipeline) and the TDD cycle comments add useful traceability. Strengths: OR-logic filter test, n-larger-than-list edge case, invalid sort key, no-alerts path, and a clean mock_data_source pattern. Gaps drag down rigor and design: (1) no tests for empty-list inputs to any function; (2) exact-threshold boundary (>= vs >) is never probed; (3) parse_processes float-coercion path (string numerics) is untested; (4) no tests for the CLI/main() layer at all; (5) test_monitor_defaults_to_live_source calls the live system, directly contradicting the 'no live system state in tests' requirement and making the suite non-hermetic on restricted hosts; (6) the REQUIRED_FIELDS import is misplaced at the bottom of the file instead of the top with the other imports. Overall the suite would catch obvious regressions in the happy path and a few error paths, but the live-system test and missing boundary/empty-input coverage leave meaningful gaps.
